bullet_summary: The state’s department of primary industries said the man was bitten by a suspected 4
Reported by Guardian Australia, ABC News Australia, The Age

items.title: Man fighting for life after being bitten by shark off Western Australian coast
items.standfirst: Government department says man was diving around Michaelmas Island, near Albany, when he was bitten by a suspected 4.5-metre sharkGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA male diver aged in his 30s is fighting for life after being bitten by a shark in Western Australia.The state’s department of primary industries said the man was bitten by a suspected 4.5-metre shark just before 11.30am Saturday AWST, while he was diving near Michaelmas Island off the coast of Albany, about 375kms south-east of Perth. Continue reading...
items.content: Government department says man was diving around Michaelmas Island, near Albany, when he was bitten by a suspected 4.5-metre sharkGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA male diver aged in his 30s is fighting for life after being bitten by a shark in Western Australia.The state’s department of primary industries said the man was bitten by a suspected 4.5-metre shark just before 11.30am Saturday AWST, while he was diving near Michaelmas Island off the coast of Albany, about 375kms south-east of Perth. Continue reading...

items.title: Breaking: Diver dies after bite by suspected 4.5m shark off Albany, WA
items.standfirst: A male diver has died after an attack by a suspected 4.5-metre shark near Michaelmas Island, off WA's Albany coast, on Saturday morning.
items.content: A male diver has died after an attack by a suspected 4.5-metre shark near Michaelmas Island, off WA's Albany coast, on Saturday morning.
